title: River Lady
writer: D.D. Beauchamp, William Bowers, Houston Branch
actors: Yvonne De Carlo, Dan Duryea, Rod Cameron
plot: During the 1850s, crooked lumber syndicate man Beauvais tries to take over the local mill while Sequin, the sensual owner of a gambling riverboat, tries to control the heart of Mississippi lumberjack Dan Corrigan.
